positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for yale_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    sK0(X0) != X0 | ~endowment_value(X0) | largest_endowment(X0)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    endowment_value(yale)).

cnf(u15,negated_conjecture,
    ~largest_endowment(yale)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    endowment_value(sK0(X0)) | ~endowment_value(X0) | largest_endowment(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define endowment_greater(X0,X1) := $false
for all groundings,
    whenever endowment_value(X0) & ! [X1] : ((endowment_value(X1) & X1 != X0) => endowment_greater(X0,X1)) is false, set ~largest_endowment(X0) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for yale_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define largest_endowment(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define endowment_value(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define endowment_greater(X0,X1) := $true
for all groundings,
    whenever endowment_value(X0) & ! [X1] : ((endowment_value(X1) & X1 != X0) => endowment_greater(X0,X1)) is true, set largest_endowment(X0) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
